title: stackhousia minima
intro: Stackhousia minima, also known as the small stackhousia or small grey stackhousia, is a small shrub native to eastern Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate the immune system and exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Stackhousia minima include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be guided by a qualified healthcare professional.
